CustomField.description: Patient mobile number — Annexure C1.1 core person attribute; also the channel for OTP citizen auth (D-013) and SMS notifications (D-014). One of the three inputs (with full name + DOB) normalized into VS_Match_Key__c for exact-match de-dup (D-011/D-017); required because the match key cannot be computed without it. One mobile number MAY be shared by many VS_Patient__c records (booker != patient, REQ-004) — this is modeled as multiple patient rows sharing the same mobile, not a lookup to a separate "booker" person object.
CustomField.label: Mobile
